name: Megacable Comunicaciones de Mexico
notes:
At MCM our goal is to offer the services that best solve your business telecommunications problems. We are experienced and have been pioneers in designing solutions for Mexican companies, which is why we can serve you efficiently. All our services are run over our own fiber optic telecommunications network, which is one of the most advanced in Mexico: redundant, scalable, and flexible, in addition to being connected to the backbone with Tier 1 carriers in the United States. 

We have a national & metropolitan fiber network thats constantly expand in the most important cities in Mexico, this expansion of our network has allowed us to offer connectivity in all Data Center at Mexito included Queretaro and guarantee end-to-end performance
